title: betula × kusmisscheffii
intro: Betula × kusmisscheffii, also known as Kusnezsky birch or Silver Birch, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the Betulaceae family, resulting from the cross between Betula pendula and Betula costata. The bark of Betula × kusmisscheffii contains betulin, a compound that exhibits anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for medicinal purposes. The plant is known to provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and acting as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. Betula × kusmisscheffii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its bark can also be used in topical applications, such as creams and salves, to harness its medicinal properties.
